product_overview: Icebreaker.io is a realtime anonymous stranger-matching web app where two people are paired, exchange a short turn-based interaction, then privately decide to stay connected or vanish. The product emphasizes ephemeral connections and user-controlled sharing.
core_goals: Allow a visitor to pick an alias and join a live matchmaking queue
Pair two strangers in realtime and run a short, turn-based interaction
Give both participants a private decision to stay connected or vanish after the interaction
Provide a shareable link when both choose to stay while preserving privacy when either vanishes
Offer static safety and philosophy content for users to read before or after matches

features.name: Username Entry
features.description: Collect a short alias from the visitor and enqueue them for matchmaking; validate alias format before joining the queue.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type username into alias input field (letters, numbers, spaces, underscores, max 20 chars) -> Submit username to join matchmaking -> See RevealModal popup with context and option to proceed -> Confirm entry to proceed and be redirected to /waiting
Navigate to / -> Type an invalid username (disallowed characters or longer than 20 chars) -> Attempt to submit -> See validation error about allowed characters and maximum length

features.name: Online Count Display
features.description: Show the current number of strangers online so visitors know the pool size before joining.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe pulsing dot indicating online stranger count on the landing page

features.name: Matchmaking Queue
features.description: Place validated users into a realtime queue, show a waiting state, and move matched users into a paired session.
user_flows: Navigate to /waiting -> See orbiting ring animation while waiting -> See online stranger count in top-right panel updating -> Remain in queue until a connection is found -> Observe connection-found state and be redirected into the paired session
Navigate to /waiting -> Decide to leave the lobby -> Choose to leave lobby -> Be redirected back to /

features.name: Turn-based Messaging Session (6 total messages)
features.description: Two matched users exchange a short, turn-enforced conversation (three turns each, max 280 chars per message). After the final message both users move to a private decision screen.
user_flows: Be redirected to a paired session after a match -> See the shared prompt for the session -> Observe turn indicator showing whose turn it is -> Compose and submit a message (<= 280 characters) -> See waiting state until the stranger responds -> Receive the stranger's message and observe updated turn indicator -> Alternate sending messages until both have sent three messages each (6 total) -> See Decision screen after the final message
Be redirected to a paired session after a match -> Compose a message longer than 280 characters -> Attempt to submit -> See validation error indicating the maximum message length

features.name: Decision & Result Screen
features.description: After the session each participant privately chooses whether to Stay Connected or Vanish; mutual Stay yields a shareable link and optional identity reveal, any Vanish yields a private disappearance.
user_flows: See Decision screen after the final exchange -> Choose Stay Connected privately -> Wait for the stranger's decision -> Both choose Stay -> See 'you matched' outcome with stranger alias and a generated share link -> Toggle identity sharing on or off -> Copy share link to clipboard -> Choose to match again to return to /
See Decision screen after the final exchange -> Choose Vanish privately -> Observe 'gone.' outcome (if either user vanishes) and end the session

features.name: Static Safety & Philosophy Pages
features.description: Provide non-interactive informational pages about safety and the product philosophy accessible from the site navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select Safety from the navbar -> Navigate to /safety -> Read safety guidance and recommendations -> Return to /
Navigate to / -> Select Philosophy from the navbar -> Navigate to /philosophy -> Read product philosophy and about content -> Return to /

routes.description: Landing page with username input and "Find a Stranger" CTA
Waiting room — emits join_queue via Socket.io, waits for match_found
MCQ session — 3 rounds of multiple choice questions answered turn-by-turn
Result page — shows "you matched" or "gone" based on game outcome

features.name: Username Entry
features.description: User enters an alias (letters, numbers, spaces, underscores, max 20 chars) and clicks "Find a Stranger"
user_interactions: Type username into alias input field
Click "Find a Stranger" button or press Enter
See validation error for invalid characters
See RevealModal popup after valid submission
Click "Enter the Void" in modal to proceed to /waiting

features.name: Online Count Display
features.description: Shows live count of strangers online via Socket.io queue_update event
user_interactions: See pulsing dot with online stranger count on landing page

features.name: Matchmaking Queue
features.description: User waits in queue; server pairs two users and emits match_found
user_interactions: See orbiting ring animation while waiting
See online stranger count in top-right panel
Click "Leave Lobby" to cancel and return to landing
See "connection found" state when matched before navigating to session

features.name: MCQ Session (3 Rounds)
features.description: Two matched users answer 3 multiple-choice questions; answers revealed after both respond; mismatch ends session
user_interactions: See current round indicator (1 of 3, 2 of 3, 3 of 3)
Read question text
Click one of the answer options
See "waiting for the stranger" state after submitting
See round result (matched / no match) with both answers revealed
Progress to next question if matched
Navigate to result page after all 3 rounds or a mismatch
See disconnected state if stranger leaves

features.name: Result / Outcome Screen
features.description: Shows final outcome — "you matched" with share link if both stay connected, or "gone" if either vanishes
user_interactions: See "you matched" heading with stranger username if connected
Toggle identity sharing on/off
Copy share link to clipboard
Click "match again" to return to landing and clear session
See "gone." screen if outcome is vanished

features.name: Navigation (Safety & Philosophy pages)
features.description: Static informational pages accessible from navbar
user_interactions: Click "Safety" link in navbar
Click "Philosophy" link in navbar

known_limitations.issue: Session and Result pages rely on sessionStorage for state; direct URL access without prior flow will render nothing
known_limitations.impact: Tests must follow the full user flow rather than directly navigating to session/result URLs

known_limitations.issue: Real-time matching requires two simultaneous browser sessions; single-user tests cannot reach the session phase without a second socket client
known_limitations.impact: End-to-end session tests require coordinating two browser tabs or simulated socket clients
